question: The chart shows regional sales share. Which statement is correct according to the percentage labels in the chart?

options.A: West has the largest market share among the regions shown.
options.B: Central has the smallest market share among the regions shown.
options.C: North accounts for more than half of the market.
options.D: South and East each account for more than 10% of the market.

explanation: From the labels, North has the highest share (54%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking North is largest when relying on visual comparison.
